transcript.text:
[Gangnam's Oldest Ramen Restaurant?]
[And even the name is...]
[Ultramen]
[In that case...]
[Everything from the menu~!]!
[How is that all going to fit?]
[Like this]
[That's amazing!]
[And she can't push this down?]
[After eating that much?]
[Please]
[Weak]
[Well then...]
[A jaw breaker... but at what cost?]
Hello everyone
I'm at Nonhyeon-dong today

Gangnam's oldest ramen restaurant is located here
There's this very unique dish: Tomato Ramen
I've only done challenge mukbangs for ramen
Let's do a real ramen mukbang today Let's go!
[Ultramen] [Seoul, Gangnam-gu]
I'm going to eat everything on the menu
Hello~
[Restaurant decorated with Ultraman]
It's 3pm and it's a full-house
What to eat?
Everything from the menu
There are 5 different ramen flavors
Tomato ramen! That's cool
Excuse me,
Miso ramen, Shoyu ramen, Tsukemen, Shin-Shin Tsukemen,
4 bowls?

Yes, and also the Tomato ramen,
Gyoza, mini fried rice, mini beef rice, mini curry rice, please
I enjoy salty, so lots of seasoning please
[Making the noodles fresh from the store]
[Every dish from Ultramen]
Thank you
[The Tomato Ramen]
[Dishes coming out 1 by 1]
She really does eat a lot...
How does that all fit?
It's all here [We apologize for the poor audio quality. It comes back to normal at 8:57]
[No space left on the table]
The most standard dish first... Miso
The broth is soybean-based
They make the noodles from here
Wait,

Right, soup first!
You have to taste the soup first
Delicious!
Salty and tasty
Tastes traditional
The noodles are really good!
That's good
I'm not sure how to describe the taste
The broth has very deep, soybean-based flavors
Tastes very local
Char siu (pork)
It has a smokey flavor
Can I add more orders of char siu?
[There are more in other dishes]
Tomato! Really unique, right? Tomato ramen
[What will this taste like...?]

[Not soup, but it's not sauce either]
I imagined it to taste like tomato-egg fried rice
I really enjoy eating that too
It's similar, but different!
Almost like a tomato spaghetti
A piece of tomato here
[Tsukemen] (Dipping noodles)
This is the spicy, and this is the regular
The noodles are fairly thick
It's like udon noodles with ramen
A small dip of that gives such strong flavors
This is like espresso
This is the best so far
Excuse me,
1 Ramune, please (Japanese carbonated soft drink)
Take this out

[And push it down...]
[Then make it work]
Drop the marble in and it will start fizzing
Refreshing
-How long have you guys been here? -13 years
-How's the food? -It's tasty
I love the Tsukemen
[She knows what's up!]
Gyoza (fried dumplings)
Fried on the top, but the bottom is steamed
Juicy
A bite of rice now?
There are 2 methods to eat curry rice
Either mix or scoop
I scoop it
It's perfect!

It's good
Shin-Shin Tsukemen now
Spicy level 4
[4=death?]
This is good too
Very similar
Similar flavors
[Perfect to pick and choose what to dip in]
[A little spicy for me]
A bite of Shoyu
Soup first
Salty, but addicting
There's a soft boiled egg here
Look at this
This is it
Wrap it with dried seaweed

Very nice
Oh, fried rice!
Beef rice too
This is delicious
[Some Tsukemen]
There's a saying that goes something like "The ramen soup is like a father's sweat"
It's like that You can taste the hardwork
Let's finish them up now
Tomato chunks like this
It's good together
They make the noodles fresh
So the noodles are not soggy
Very gelatinous? (Just eat)
It's just good
-All that by yourself? -Yes
That's amazing

[Amazing, indeed...]
Char siu
Finally some char siu
I keep going for the noodles first
So that it doesn't get bloated
It goes really well
Especially with the egg rice
Let's make the tomato-egg rice
Move this here
[More Ramune]
Hold it here
And one-punch(?)
Like this?
Then it will explode
Like this One punch!
I'm weak

[Chin-punch]
[Are you okay...?]
Noodles
Still fresh after 30 minutes
They're all so unique, so I can't just pick 1
But... #1 Tsukemen,
#2 Miso, #3 Tomato, #4 Shoyu
Char siu dipped here
[This is it]
What? I'm finished?
I can't drink all the soup because of the seasonings
This is no joke
1 last bowl of Tsukemen
The broth is so thick that it's making a thin layer on top
You see this?
Do you eat like this everyday?

I eat like this every meal
I would weigh 250kg if I ate like that
You don't eat like that but you're still getting there
You know how Japan is shaped like this?
These are Central-Japan style ramen
Some customers question why we serve different-style of ramen
Different region, different ramen
You must love the show Ultraman
It's just for the name
Not really a fan of the anime Ultraman
2/3 of these are from our customers
[Customers brought these to the restaurant as gifts]
Bring us any extra Ultraman toys/props
Perfect
One-punch!
[Fail...]

Grab it here
Thank you
This is kinda hard to drink
You have to get it right on the gap
Oh this right here? OH!
It's science
There's a space for the marble, so it doesn't block
It's coming out fine now
Break the egg?
With some Tsukemen soup
Dip it here
Last try If I can't do this after eating this much...
I can't even do it with 2 hands
I have more strength on my left arm
It's true...?
I love having more curry than rice

It's annoying when there's a lot of rice with little curry
[Finishing up the rest]
-Are you done? -Yes
[Clap, Clap, Clap!]
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
